name: Postgres DBA Snippets
author: QoreDB
description: A pack of ready-to-run PostgreSQL diagnostic queries — table sizes, bloat, index usage, slow queries, locks and idle connections. Insert them from the snippets menu in the query editor.

snippets.label: Table sizes (top 20)
snippets.description: Largest tables by total size, including indexes and TOAST.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  schemaname AS schema,
  relname AS table,
  pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(relid)) AS total_size,
  pg_size_pretty(pg_relation_size(relid)) AS table_size,
  pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(relid) - pg_relation_size(relid)) AS index_size
FROM pg_catalog.pg_statio_user_tables
ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size(relid) DESC
LIMIT 20;

snippets.label: Unused indexes
snippets.description: Indexes that have never been scanned — candidates for removal.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  schemaname AS schema,
  relname AS table,
  indexrelname AS index,
  pg_size_pretty(pg_relation_size(indexrelid)) AS index_size,
  idx_scan AS scans
FROM pg_stat_user_indexes
WHERE idx_scan = 0
  AND indexrelid NOT IN (SELECT conindid FROM pg_constraint WHERE contype IN ('p', 'u'))
ORDER BY pg_relation_size(indexrelid) DESC;

snippets.label: Slow queries (pg_stat_statements)
snippets.description: Top statements by total execution time. Requires the pg_stat_statements extension.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  calls,
  round(total_exec_time::numeric, 1) AS total_ms,
  round(mean_exec_time::numeric, 2) AS mean_ms,
  round((100 * total_exec_time / sum(total_exec_time) OVER ())::numeric, 1) AS pct,
  query
FROM pg_stat_statements
ORDER BY total_exec_time DESC
LIMIT 20;

snippets.label: Blocking locks
snippets.description: Sessions currently blocked, and the session blocking them.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  blocked.pid AS blocked_pid,
  blocked.query AS blocked_query,
  blocking.pid AS blocking_pid,
  blocking.query AS blocking_query
FROM pg_stat_activity AS blocked
JOIN pg_stat_activity AS blocking
  ON blocking.pid = ANY(pg_blocking_pids(blocked.pid))
WHERE cardinality(pg_blocking_pids(blocked.pid)) > 0;

snippets.label: Idle in transaction
snippets.description: Connections holding a transaction open without doing work.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  pid,
  usename AS user,
  state,
  now() - state_change AS idle_for,
  query
FROM pg_stat_activity
WHERE state = 'idle in transaction'
ORDER BY state_change ASC;

snippets.label: Cache hit ratio
snippets.description: Buffer cache hit rate — aim for > 0.99 on a warm database.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  sum(heap_blks_hit) AS cache_hits,
  sum(heap_blks_read) AS disk_reads,
  round(
    sum(heap_blks_hit)::numeric
    / nullif(sum(heap_blks_hit) + sum(heap_blks_read), 0),
    4
  ) AS hit_ratio
FROM pg_statio_user_tables;

snippets.label: Bloat / dead tuples
snippets.description: Tables with the most dead rows awaiting vacuum.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  schemaname AS schema,
  relname AS table,
  n_live_tup AS live_rows,
  n_dead_tup AS dead_rows,
  round(100 * n_dead_tup::numeric / nullif(n_live_tup + n_dead_tup, 0), 1) AS dead_pct,
  last_autovacuum
FROM pg_stat_user_tables
WHERE n_dead_tup > 0
ORDER BY n_dead_tup DESC
LIMIT 20;
